item.title: Paywall Be Gone
item.description: FAQ What? Prepend 12ft.io/ to the URL of any paywalled page, and we'll try our best to remove the paywall and get you access to the article. Why? I believe Google Adwords killed the web. Google Adwords incentivized sites to peddle SEO optimized garbage. Sites who aren't are forced to optimize for email capture so they can market directly to you. Search results now show "news", ads, and SEO spam instead of surfacing information. You ought to be able to search something on Google and get an answer to your question without signing up for some newsletter. This is why I created 12ft.io. How does it work? The idea is pretty simple, news sites want Google to index their content so it shows up in search results. So they don't show a paywall to the Google crawler. We benefit from this because the Google crawler will cache a copy of the site every time it crawls it. All we do is show you that cached, unpaywalled version of the page.
item.dc:creator: WiredIn2Much

item.title: Awesome prosthetic
item.description: Not just for looks, it helps keep his glasses on and his mouth from drying up. https://instagram.com/prostheticshand?utm_medium=copy_link

item.dc:creator: bocalbosweiland42

item.title: So there's this
item.description: I have zero intention to say anything to anyone I work with. Due to how women have been harassed after their place of employment finds out. I'm telling complete strangers this only to alleviate the tick of knowing something juicy and keeping it a secret. Viral edit: no I will not post the link. As much as you have all claimed to increase her subs no I will not publicly or privately expose her. Sorry there is plenty of material out there for you all. Also no I did not sub as much as you won't believe me. I am not in a management position or do we work together on a daily basis. We work in different departments and have little to no interaction. But it is a small company. It has been known through her FB account she had done some modeling at some point by upper management. There is no policy for or against it that I would see she violates, like I said before it's a small company rumors spread like wild fire. I know all too well what it's like to have your personal life topic of conversation throughout the work place, I will not do that to another. As far as I'm concerned it's her life and she is free to do whatever she chooses to help supplement her income. Yes, it sucks that some people take this route to make ends meet, and it needs to change. If you are willing and can deal with I am sure the shit ton of negativity, fear, and anything else that comes with being a scientist.
item.dc:creator: steveo80

item.title: Witcher meme dump
item.dc:creator: pjspacepirate

item.description: getting a few extended years of mom time with these kiddos was something I didn’t know I needed. Seeing them grown, navigating life, making choices and preserve through all of this, I just feel very blessed to have been in a place to welcome them home. I don’t think I’m supposed to be enjoying this as much as I am, but listening to them all (6 total now!!) washing up dishes last evening, laughing, bonding…it just makes my mom heart happy. Hug your kids, every single chance you get. FP edit, Hug your kids and hug your parents. Shit, hug everyone. We all need it. love you all.
item.dc:creator: DamnitCheryl

item.title: There are good folks in Tennessee
item.description:
Not everyone in Tennessee is an ignorant book burner.
Our state is massively effed up, but there are good people.
I’m so often ashamed of Tennessee so it’s great to see actual good news. “The only thing necessary for the triumph of evil is for good people to do nothing.” Good people have plenty to keep them busy in Tennessee.
https://gofund.me/f595c058
item.dc:creator: reris
